name: Silent Watch
description: The Arcloft Syndicate sees everything and is seen by none. Eight missions of surveillance, stealth, and precision strikes.

missions.name: Eyes Open
missions.briefing: Establish a surveillance network across the contested zone before other factions realise what is happening. The Overwatch Protocol begins here — deploy Aether Relays and keep Vigilant patrol jets airborne to ensure nothing moves unseen.
objectives: Deploy 3 Aether Relay towers
Keep at least 1 Vigilant detector jet airborne at all times
Remain undetected for 8 minutes
missions.twist: Stormrend Scrap Hawks will probe your perimeter — Vigilants detect them before they reach the relays.

missions.name: Data Harvest
missions.briefing: Stormrend's communication infrastructure holds valuable intelligence. Extract it before they encrypt and purge the data. Dispatch Vigilant jets ahead of the Patch Drone to sweep the approach for hidden Stormrend units.
objectives: Capture the Stormrend signal tower
Extract the intelligence via Patch Drone
Destroy any enemy units that detect the Patch Drone
missions.twist: Stormrend Flicker Mines line the approach — invisible to your units unless a Vigilant is within detector range. Clear the route before committing the Patch Drone.

missions.name: The Ironmarch Files
missions.briefing: Ironmarch is building something secret. Arcloft reconnaissance reveals it must be destroyed. A Phantom Sub has been pre-positioned in the river delta for the extraction phase — use it to cover the withdrawal once the site is destroyed.
objectives: Destroy the secret Ironmarch construction site
Escape before reinforcements arrive
Keep the Phantom Sub undetected throughout
missions.twist: Ironmarch Signal Trucks scan for electronic emissions — they will detect Vigilant jets if they fly too close. Use the Phantom Sub's overwatch stealth ping to spot enemy positions instead.

missions.name: Archipelago Silence
missions.briefing: Arcloft Phantom Submarines will cut naval communication cables between enemy island bases. The Kragmore fleet includes Deep Bore stealth submarines of their own — use your Phantom Sub's overwatch stealth ping to find them before they find you.
objectives: Deploy Phantom Submarines to cut 3 cable nodes
Destroy any Kragmore Deep Bore submarines before they can torpedo your vessels
Avoid detection by enemy surface patrols
missions.twist: Bastion Corvettes carry stealth-detection sonar — your Phantom Sub must surface briefly to use the overwatch ping, which will immediately reveal its position to any nearby Corvette.

missions.name: The Valkyr Gambit
missions.briefing: Valkyr is close to discovering Arcloft's network. A counter-intelligence operation must discredit them. Valkyr Overwatch Drones blanket the area with stealth detection — your forces must neutralise the drones before attempting any stealth approach.
objectives: Destroy 2 Valkyr Overwatch Drone towers to blind their detection net
Plant false intelligence at the Valkyr HQ using a Patch Drone
Eliminate any Valkyr Kestrel jets that spot the operation
missions.twist: Valkyr Kestrel jets are detector aircraft — they will reveal any stealthed Arcloft unit they fly over. Prioritise them before deploying the Patch Drone.

missions.name: Eyes Everywhere
missions.briefing: Expand the Aether Relay network to cover all six faction territories simultaneously. Vigilant patrol jets must maintain unbroken detector coverage — without them the Relays are blind nodes.
objectives: Establish relay coverage over all 6 spawn zones
Maintain at least 2 Vigilant jets airborne in each sector
Survive attacks from 3 factions for 15 minutes
missions.twist: Kragmore Mole Rats and Valkyr Windrunners will approach stealthed — Vigilant jets are your only warning before the stealth units reach the relays.

missions.name: Quantum Silence
missions.briefing: Activate the Quantum Detection Grid upgrade — which will permanently extend stealth-reveal range to every Arcloft detector across the theatre. Defend the tech lab while the Grid comes online.
objectives: Research the Quantum Detection Grid upgrade
Survive until it activates (10 minutes)
Prevent the tech lab from being destroyed
missions.twist: All factions deploy stealth infiltrators — Stormrend Flicker Mines, Kragmore Mole Rats, Valkyr Windrunners — specifically targeting your tech lab. Without the Quantum Detection Grid active, you cannot see them coming.

missions.name: The Six Fronts
missions.briefing: Arcloft has seen everything. Now it is time to act. The Cordite Nexus must be seized — silently. Phantom Submarines approach from the waterways while Vigilant jets hold air superiority above. The Overwatch Protocol reaches its final expression.
objectives: Capture the Cordite Nexus without triggering a multi-faction coalition
Establish a Refinery before any other faction
Maintain Vigilant detector coverage over the Nexus at all times
missions.twist: Bastion Patrol Rovers and Valkyr Overwatch Drones watch all approach routes — if Arcloft is spotted capturing the Nexus by more than 2 factions simultaneously, all will attack. The Phantom Sub's underwater approach is the only undetected route.
